message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. For verification, confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last 2 digits are 02.
Identity verified for account ****1184. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Disclosure completed: AI agent acting on behalf of Slice; conversation logged. Identity verified using last 2 digits of phone on file. Debt context established for masked account ****1184 with current amount due 8400. Borrower stated they cannot pay this month and signaled hardship/cannot-pay-now. No payment arrangement, discount, or approval discussed. No further assessment questions required for this stage based on current policy and borrower statement. Next stage should discuss available next steps by phone and should not repeat identity verification or re-ask the same hardship statement."}
